parsed_review.summary: CP00-388 is a clean, fully-evidenced descriptor-only pack (RP12 Billing And Invoicing, Risk C, 150 units, range RP12.P08.M06.S09-RP12.P09.M03.S22) that closes the RP12.P08 phase and opens the RP12.P09 foundation. The pack-level production_ready claim is correctly FALSE: manifest.json (status=implemented_pending_review, implementation_layer=descriptor, runtime_ready=false) and command-evidence.json (production_ready=false, gate_outcome=implementation_gates_passed_post_review_closeout_pending) make no production overclaim; the descriptor-level production_ready_candidate=true is justified by passing coverage+slice validation. Coverage reconciles exactly: deliverable distribution {hermes_evidence:42, claude_review:15, implementation:73, test:8, security_audit:8, ui:4}=150, phase counts P08:88/P09:62, and all nine micro-phase/micro-title counts match the baseline; validators enforce pack_id, risk_class, unit_count, first/last unit IDs, RP12-only, and no-duplicate constraints, and model.test.js + the validator script independently assert them. Claude remains a read-only independent reviewer and not final approver: claude_is_final_approval=false, promotes_claude_to_final_approval=false, allowed_tools=[Read,Grep,Glob], human_final_approval_required_for_runtime_opening=true, consistent across descriptor, no-write attestation, contract projection, and review-request. Hermes control-plane patterns are used only for deterministic descriptor-only review packet/receipt handling (receipt_shape descriptor_only_billing_p08_closeout_p09_foundation_no_write, emits_hermes_runtime_receipt=false, program.descriptor_only=true) and not product runtime. No-real-data/no-write boundaries hold: freezeCp388Result stamps no_real_data=true, writes_product_state=false and ~20 additional false runtime/write flags; source contains no fs writes, network, process.env, or child_process, and no secrets/PII were found. CP178+ review hardening is satisfied: all eleven invalid-review-evidence blockers (failed_authentication_run, zero_byte_output, malformed_json_output, fenced_json_output, tool_call_shaped_output, disabled_tools_run, missing_raw_output_reference, missing_source_inspection_basis, claude_final_approval_claim, source_mutation_claim, production_enterprise_trust_claim) are encoded; readiness auth-preflight passed with valid non-empty JSON; summary_only_review_allowed=false is correctly enforced for the Risk C / security-audit / review-evidence pack. The full cross-artifact integrity chain agrees (contract header and embedded CP388 projection deep-equal the runtime descriptor; registry/service/validators/manifest/baseline/tests/validator-script all consistent). closeout-pack:validate and cached git diff --check are correctly deferred to post-review final closeout per the hardened review sequence (they consume this review's output) and are documented in command-evidence notes — expected sequencing, not a defect. The stale new-session-handoff.md and other dirty files are explicitly scoped as unrelated_dirty_files_preserved and are not part of this pack. No P0/P1/P2/P3 findings; does not block pack or goal closeout. Final enterprise-trust/production approval remains a human gate outside this read-only review.
